name: tuyens-agent-skills
description: Marketplace for Tuyen's Agent Skills plugins: architecture, delivery, oncall, spec, codemap, java, kotlin, python, ruby, node, go, dotnet, rust, php, react, vue, and angular.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic skills for multi-stack development - auto-detects any tech stack

plugins.name: delivery
plugins.description: Workflow skills for software delivery: scope breakdown and tech debt triage.

plugins.name: architecture
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic architecture design plugin: unified system design (boundaries + API contracts + C4 diagrams), re-architecture (monolith decomposition, service consolidation, legacy modernization), database migration planning, and dependency upgrade assessment. Every workflow doubles as a review workflow with severity-tagged findings and verdict.

plugins.name: oncall
plugins.description: Workflow and atomic skills for oncall work: triage, investigation, root cause analysis, and postmortem. Requires core plugin.

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Spec-Driven Development (SDD) plugin: produces persistent per-feature artifacts (spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md) under .specs/<slug>/. Mirrors Spec Kit phases with speckit-aware and standalone modes. Depends only on core.

plugins.name: codemap
plugins.description: Persistent codebase knowledge graph: build/sync .codemap/graph.json via pure-LLM extraction with parallel sub-agents. Ask the graph (task-codemap-ask), play guided walkthroughs (task-codemap-guide), deep-dive entities (task-codemap-explain). Opt-in auto-update hook on git commit/merge/rebase. Depends only on core.

plugins.name: java
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Java 21+ / Spring Boot 3.5+ development.

plugins.name: kotlin
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Kotlin 2.0+ / Spring Boot 3.5+ development.

plugins.name: python
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Python 3.11+ / FastAPI / Django development.

plugins.name: ruby
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Ruby 3.2+ / Ruby on Rails 7.2+ development.

plugins.name: node
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Node.js/TypeScript development.

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Go/Gin development.

plugins.name: dotnet
plugins.description: Skills and agents for .NET 8 LTS / ASP.NET Core Web API development with Clean Architecture.

plugins.name: rust
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Rust 1.94+ / Axum / sqlx development.

plugins.name: react
plugins.description: Skills and agents for React 19+ / TypeScript / Next.js development.

plugins.name: vue
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Vue 3.5+ / TypeScript / Nuxt 3 development.

plugins.name: angular
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Angular 21+ / TypeScript / Angular CLI development.

plugins.name: php
plugins.description: Skills and agents for PHP 8.5 / Laravel 12+ development.
